summary: Frontend-only verification of Paneltec mobile v160.0.18 hotfix: (BUG-1) duplicate FORMS section removed from Home, (BUG-2) 'MANAGE & COMPLY' replaced by 'FORMS & COMPLIANCE', (BUG-3) /forms/library back button + 2-column grid. All three bugs verified fixed. Regression on category navigation also confirmed.

test_results.BUG-1_no_duplicate_FORMS_section: PASS - No standalone 'FORMS' section header on /(tabs)/dashboard. captureIds array empty (no capture-card-* testids rendered). CAPTURE_TOOLS array is defined in code but no longer rendered — confirmed by inline v160.0.18 comment marker on dashboard.tsx lines 255-257.
test_results.BUG-2_header_renamed: PASS by code review - dashboard.tsx line 240 renders literal 'FORMS & COMPLIANCE'; string 'MANAGE & COMPLY' does not appear anywhere in dashboard.tsx. Live UI showed safe-fallback banner (expected per request note); with visibleManage.length===0 in safe fallback the header + tiles are hidden altogether — matches the gated behaviour.
test_results.BUG-3a_back_button: PASS - [data-testid='library-back-btn'] present, contains chevron-back icon + text 'Back', positioned top-left. onPress calls router.back() correctly (direct-URL nav shows expected 'GO_BACK not handled' when there is no history, which is per-design).
test_results.BUG-3b_2_column_grid: PASS - 6 category cards rendered in exactly 2 columns (x=16, x=200) x 3 rows (y=48, 205, 362) on 390px viewport. Card width 174px each with ~10px gap — fills screen width edge-to-edge. Testids cat-card-general, cat-card-pre_start, cat-card-inspection, cat-card-near_miss, cat-card-incident, cat-card-toolbox all present. Each card shows icon badge, title, blurb, count.
test_results.Regression_form_fill_flow: PASS - Tapping cat-card-general navigates to /forms/category/general; template rows (form-row-<id>) render correctly (10+ General category templates listed).
test_results.Regression_bottom_tab_bar: PASS - Tab bar contains only: Home, QR Scan, Outbox, My Work, Profile. No 'Forms' or 'Capture' tab present.

critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.tsx still defines CAPTURE_TOOLS array (lines 47-54) and its visibleCapture memo (line 70) even though they are no longer rendered after v160.0.18. Consider removing dead code to avoid confusion and keep bundle lean.

dashboard.tsx StyleSheet has duplicate keys: 'metricLabel' declared twice (lines 307 & 317), 'metricSub' declared twice (lines 308 & 318), 'captureTitle' twice (309 & 322), 'captureDesc' twice (313 & 323). The latter wins at runtime — should dedupe.
test_credentials: Used admin: stephen@paneltec.com.au / Mcgstephen50# (login via /api/auth/login returned 200, role=admin).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web preview at https://whs-compliance.expo.preview.emergentagent.com is React-Native-Web; login by POST /api/auth/login then set localStorage keys paneltec_token + paneltec_user (JSON.stringified user). Safe-fallback banner appears when modules matrix fails — expected on this preview; can still verify structural changes via testids.
